name: tlsGetLastErrorAsString
title: tlsGetLastErrorAsString
syntax: long tlsGetLastErrorAsString(dword socket, char buffer[], dword bufferLength );
description: Retrieves the error message of the last operation that failed on a specified socket.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The buffer used to store the error message.

parameters.name: bufferLength
parameters.description: The size of the text buffer.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
